model.name: Model for apixaban absorption in the small intestine

notes.body:
Model for apixaban absorption
The content of this model has been carefully created in a manual research effort.

rdf:li.vCard4:organization-name: Humboldt-Universität zu Berlin, Institute for Theoretical Biology
Charité University Medicine Berlin, Master Molecular Medicine

Humboldt-Universität zu Berlin, Faculty of Life Sciences, Department of Biology, Institute of Theoretical Biology, Systems Medicine of the Liver; University of Stuttgart, Institute of Structural Mechanics and Dynamics in Aerospace Engineering

parameter.name: amount of apixaban when rate of absorption reaches 50% of maximal rate

body.p: 1.0: normal absorption corresponding to tablet under fasting conditions.

pre.code: allows to change the velocity of absorption

body.p: Swallowing, dissolution of tablet, and transport into intestine. Overall process describing the rates of this processes.
Swallowing, dissolution of solution, and transport into intestine. Overall process describing the rates of this processes.
